query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A person walks along a city sidewalk at night with additional figures visible farther down the path. Street lamps line the walkway, casting circular pools of light that reflect on the wet pavement. Buildings and vertical poles stand along the edges of the frame, while atmospheric haze fills the space between the foreground and background structures.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A foggy night scene on a city sidewalk rendered with extreme underexposure and blown highlights, reducing a lone pedestrian and distant figures to silhouettes with no visible features. Heavy haze smears architectural details and dissolves textures into indistinct gray masses, while a desaturated, monotone palette and oppressive low contrast crush midtones into a suffocating, heavy atmosphere that evokes melancholy, isolation, and dread.
